name: Strawberry Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Substitute the pourable fruit with strawberry fruit spread.
2. Do not use reduced-calorie sour cream.
3. Preheat oven to 325°F.
4. Beat softened cream cheese in a large bowl until creamy.
5. Blend in the pourable fruit, vanilla, and salt.
6. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
7. Pour mixture into a greased 9-inch springform pan.
8. Bake for 50 minutes.
9. Combine sour cream and vanilla; mix well.
10. Carefully spoon over warm cheesecake.
11. Bake another 10 minutes, or until just set.
12. Turn off the oven; leave cheesecake in the oven with the door closed for 30 minutes.
13. Transfer to a wire rack; loosen cheesecake from the rim of the pan.
14. Cool overnight.
15. Garnish with sliced strawberries before serving.
